definition: Price trades through a liquidity level, triggers resting orders, then reverses. This IS the manipulation in PO3.
feeds_into: order_blocks (the OB before the sweep becomes the entry zone after reversal)
turtle_soup (turtle soup IS a specific type of sweep + reversal)
related_to: judas_swing (judas swing IS a sweep at session open)
SMT_divergence (SMT confirms whether sweep is manipulation or real breakout)
confirmation: Sweep is confirmed when price takes the level AND returns inside the prior range. If it keeps going → legitimate breakout, not a sweep.
chain_after_sweep: Confirmed sweep → expect displacement → displacement creates FVG + OB → enter retracement into FVG/OB. This chain is THE core ICT trade.
SL_connection: The sweep extreme (the wick beyond the liquidity level) becomes your SL reference. If price returns beyond this point, your thesis is wrong.

trading_rules.rule_1: A sweep is ONLY confirmed when price returns inside the prior range. If it keeps going = breakout, not sweep.
trading_rules.rule_2: Sweep + SMT divergence = 90%+ confidence it's manipulation (correlated asset didn't make a new extreme).
trading_rules.rule_3: The sweep wick extreme = your SL reference. If price returns beyond this point, the thesis is invalidated.
trading_rules.rule_4: Multiple sweeps of the same level = the level is exhausted. Don't expect another sweep of an already-swept level.
trading_rules.rule_5: Sweep without subsequent displacement = failed manipulation attempt. Wait for displacement to confirm.

bridge_integration.detection: scan_sweeps() checks recent 64 bars for wicks through liquidity levels that close back inside range.
bridge_integration.prompt_display: sweep_detected flag + confluence factors. Combined with displacement_confirmed for full manipulation chain.
bridge_integration.score_impact: Sweep detected adds to liquidity score. Sweep + displacement + FVG = complete ICT trade chain.
